codify_session_summary: prism-0.6.0 lessons routed via .claude/.proposals/latest.yaml (appended); zero local globals edited per cross-cli-parity + variant-authoring constraints

actions_taken.reason: Per artifact-flow.md MUST: append-not-overwrite. Status remains pending_review for loom Gate-1 classification.
Codification of pre-release lint+type sweep as /release discipline (later REJECT-folded into agents.md mechanical-sweep clause-append per cc-architect red team).

Codify-pass closure entry per /codify journal MUST gate. Documents the deliberate skip of /codify Steps 3-5 (local-globals edits) due to variant/parity constraints, and the red-team disposition for all four rule_candidate entries.

changes: added MUST clause + MUST NOT clauses
added verbatim BLOCKED rationalizations enumeration (6 phrases)
added paths frontmatter hint (TS/Py/Rust file globs)
DROPPED Dart cross-language claim (sound null-safety lacks ambient-narrowing failure mode)

actions_taken.rationale: TypeScript-only convention; Rust PhantomData is different mechanism, Dart has no analogue. Cross-language framing was unsupported.

changes: added verbatim BLOCKED rationalizations enumeration (7 phrases)

actions_taken.rationale: Standalone rule duplicated zero-tolerance Rule 1 (warnings-as-errors) + existing mechanical-sweep gate. Folding as a clause-append to agents.md is the cheaper, non-duplicative fix.

actions_skipped.reason: Local global edits to .claude/agents/* would violate cross-cli-parity.md MUST 1 (neutral-body byte-identical) and variant-authoring.md MUST 1 (slot-replacement only). Lessons routed via proposal.
No user-facing docs added in prism-0.6.0; specs were updated during /implement (PR #29 web-v0.6.0 cycle).

follow_ups_for_human: Commit working-tree changes to a chore(codify): prism-0.6.0 lessons branch + PR (per BUILD-repo rule, agent does NOT commit).

Loom-side /sync Gate 1 reviewer classifies the three remaining rule_candidate entries (1 path-scoped global, 1 path-scoped global, 1 skill-embedded) and reviews the withdrawn candidate's clause-append for agents.md.

Decide whether to backport the cc-architect red-team verdict pattern (NEEDS-REVISION / REJECT-fold / REJECT-retier) into guides/co-setup/09-proposal-protocol.md as a recommended Gate-1 reviewer triage shape.
